strategy: Attack with Storm (it takes +30% Storm); never Myth (66% resist) and expect 36% resist on everything else.
Respect his shield cycle: -25% Tower Shield on Round 1, -50% on Round 2, -90% on Round 3, then repeating every three Rounds. Never hit into a fresh shield.
Strip his Tower Shields with Shatter or Steal Ward right before your hit, and aim your bladed hit at the round the shield is weakest or already cleared.
If you want DOT pressure, plan the Shift counter: cast a DOT, he Shifts it off, then cast Shift yourself to push it back and he will not Shift again.
At 64,870 Health this is a team fight. Funnel blades and Feints onto one hitter, clear the shield, then land the Storm hit.
cheatNotes: Cast a damage-over-time on him and he immediately Shifts it off himself.
Counter it by casting Shift yourself to push the DOT back onto him; after that he will not Shift again, so your DOT sticks.
Round 1 and every third Round after, he puts up a -25% Tower Shield.
Round 2 and every third Round after, a -50% Tower Shield.
Round 3 and every third Round after, a -90% Tower Shield, so clear it before any Storm hit or it is wasted.
